headline: TELUS Expands Into AI Smart Homes And Quantum While Shares Look Undervalued
summary: TELUS (TSX:T) has introduced what it calls the world's first smart home AI assistant with generative UI, designed to integrate and control multiple home devices through a single interface. The company has also entered a new partnership with Xanadu Quantum Technologies to build sovereign quantum class and classical computing infrastructure in Canada. These announcements add fresh detail to TELUS’s push into AI driven consumer services and Canada focused digital infrastructure. TELUS is best...
